title: Sleeves Off
notes: ARMS FOCUS. Aft de-prioritized. No spinal loading, no quads. Pure hypertrophy with pump and control.

warmup.description: Run first, light upper body prep. Not logged.

exercises.name: Standing DB Curl (alternating)
exercises.notes: Slow 3 sec eccentric. No body english.

exercises.name: Flat Bench DB Curl (chest-supported)
exercises.notes: Chest down on bench. Arms hang free. 3 sec ecentric.

exercises.name: Seated DB Overhead Triceps Extension
exercises.notes: Elbows high, ribs down. Slow control.
